en_title: The Wolf Among Us 2 Now Due in 2027, Following Remaster of Telltale's Original Game
subtitle: 经典重启
opus_summary: Telltale Games在夏日游戏节上宣布，《我们身边的狼2》将于2027年登陆多平台。原版重制版《我们身边的狼 重制版》今年假期发售，包含改进画面、UI及一小时额外内容。

paragraphs.en: Telltale Games will finally launch The Wolf Among Us 2 in 2027, after a remaster of the beloved original game arrives later this year.
paragraphs.cn: Telltale Games 终于宣布，《我们身边的狼2》将于2027年发售，而备受喜爱的原版游戏重制版将在今年晚些时候先行推出。

paragraphs.en: As confirmed tonight during the Summer Game Fest 2026 showcase, The Wolf Among Us 2 is now on track for launch at some point in 2027 for PC via Steam and Epic Games Store, PlayStation 4, PS5, Nintendo Switch, Switch 2, Xbox One and Xbox Series X/S.
paragraphs.cn: 在今晚的2026年夏日游戏节发布会上确认，《我们身边的狼2》计划于2027年登陆PC（Steam和Epic Games Store）、PS4、PS5、任天堂Switch、Switch 2、Xbox One和Xbox Series X|S。

paragraphs.en: It's been almost a decade since the original incarnation of Telltale Games confirmed plans to develop more The Wolf Among Us, an adaptation of the noir fantasy series based on dark fairytale comic book Fables. The project has since survived the shuttering of Telltale , the brand's revival , a complete reboot , various delays , subsequent layoffs , and a now-dissolved partnership with Dispatch maker AdHoc Studio — which worked on the game for several years.
paragraphs.cn: 距离初代 Telltale Games 确认开发更多《我们身边的狼》内容已过去近十年，该作改编自黑色奇幻系列，基于黑暗童话漫画《寓言》。此后，这个项目经历了 Telltale 工作室关闭、品牌复兴、完全重启、多次延期、后续裁员，以及与《Dispatch》开发商 AdHoc Studio 的合作解散——后者曾为该游戏工作数年。

paragraphs.en: "Set after the events of the original game, The Wolf Among Us 2 returns players to the shadowy streets of Fabletown, where fairytale characters live hidden among humans in modern-day New York," reads an official blurb. "As tensions rise and long-simmering power struggles threaten to erupt, Snow White struggles to maintain order while new forces move to reshape the city’s underworld.
paragraphs.cn: 官方简介写道：「《我们身边的狼2》设定在原作事件之后，玩家将回到寓言镇的阴暗街道，童话角色们隐藏在现代纽约的人类之中生活。随着紧张局势加剧，长期酝酿的权力斗争一触即发，白雪公主竭力维持秩序，而新的势力正试图重塑这座城市的地下世界。」

paragraphs.en: "When a brutal series of crimes threatens to fracture the fragile balance holding Fabletown together, Bigby Wolf, sheriff of Fabletown, finds himself drawn into a dangerous conspiracy that reaches deep into the city’s criminal underworld. As suspicion spreads across the city and powerful forces work against him, Bigby must uncover the truth and decide what kind of sheriff - and what kind of wolf - he is willing to become."
paragraphs.cn: 「当一系列残酷罪行威胁到维系寓言镇的脆弱平衡时，寓言镇警长比格比·沃尔夫发现自己卷入了一场深入城市犯罪地下世界的危险阴谋。随着猜疑在全城蔓延，强大的势力与他作对，比格比必须查明真相，并决定自己愿意成为怎样的警长——以及怎样的狼。」

paragraphs.en: The Wolf Among Us 2 will arrive following a fresh version of the series' original game, which will return as The Wolf Among Us Remastered , due sometime this holiday for PC via Steam and Epic Game Store, PS5, Switch, Switch 2 and Xbox.
paragraphs.cn: 《我们身边的狼2》将在该系列原版游戏的新版本之后推出，原版将以《我们身边的狼 重制版》的形式回归，于今年假期登陆PC（Steam和Epic Games Store）、PS5、Switch、Switch 2和Xbox。

paragraphs.en: For this remaster, Telltale Games promises improved visuals, UI and accessibility features, and an hour of bonus content exploring deleted scenes, plus interviews with the game's cast.
paragraphs.cn: 对于这款重制版，Telltale Games 承诺改进画面、UI和辅助功能，并包含一小时的额外内容，探索被删除的场景以及游戏演员的访谈。

paragraphs.en: , what happened with the split from Dispatch maker Ad Hoc, and discover more about Telltale's plans for the future.
paragraphs.cn: ，了解与《Dispatch》开发商 Ad Hoc 分道扬镳的经过，以及 Telltale 未来的更多计划。

paragraphs.en: To catch up on all the announcements from tonight, be sure to check out IGN's roundup of everything announced during Summer Game Fest 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 要了解今晚的所有公告，请务必查看 IGN 对2026年夏日游戏节期间所有宣布内容的汇总。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips 是 IGN 的新闻编辑。可通过 tom_phillips@ign.com 联系他，或在 Bluesky 上找到他。

audit_issues.detail: opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 86
